title: U.N. Official Who Says U.S. Punished Her for Speech Wins a Round in Court
summary_full: The government has appealed a judge’s ruling that it violated the free speech rights of Francesca Albanese, who was sanctioned for speaking out against Israel.
summary_public: The government has appealed a judge’s ruling that it violated the free speech rights of Francesca Albanese, who was sanctioned for speaking out against Israel.

IL.label: negative
